product_information.description: Borotalco Pure deo spray is de deodorant die je huid laat ademen. De formule zonder aluminiumzouten garandeert werkzaamheid tegen geurtjes en een natuurlijke frisheid. 48 uur krachtige werking. Dermatologisch getest. 0% aluminiumzouten.

inferred_information.raw_ingredients: Butane, Isobutane, Propane, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, PPG-15 Stearyl Ether, Zinc Chloride Hydroxide, Parfum, Tapioca Starch, Propylene Carbonate, Stearalkonium Bentonite, Triethyl Citrate, Cellulose, Zea Mays Starch, Oryza Sativa Starch, Tocopheryl Acetate, Citrus Aurantium Peel Oil, Citrus Limon Peel Oil, Juniperus Virginiana Oil, Lavandula / Oil Extract, Pelargonium Graveolens Flower Oil, Alpha-Isomethyl lonone, Benzyl Benzoate, Camphor, Cinnamyl Alcohol, Citral, Citronellol, Coumarin, Geraniol, Geranyl Acetate, Hexamethylindanopyran, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, Limonene, Linalool, Linalyl Acetate, Pinene, Terpineol, Tetramethyl Acetyloctahydronaphthalenes, Trimethylbenzenepropanol
